prompt.customInstructions: RockAuto is a US online auto parts retailer. Search by part number: GET https://www.rockauto.com/en/partsearch/?partnum=<num>. Server-side HTML; no JS/auth needed. Response is a full HTML page, Content-Type text/html; charset=ISO-8859-1 but body actually uses Windows-1252 codepoints for currency (0x80 for Euro). Decode via new TextDecoder('windows-1252').decode(arrayBuffer).
prompt.knownIssues: Currency is determined by visitor geolocation/cookie and cannot be forced via URL param — parse the symbol from the rendered price (€, $, £, etc.) and map to ISO 4217. Use .listing-price '(€X.XX/Each)' for the PER-UNIT price; .listing-total can be a quantity multiple (e.g. SBI valve guides sold in packs of 8 show total=€36.32 with unit=€4.54). Images are relative paths under /info/...; prepend https://www.rockauto.com. The moreinfo.php href is a usable per-product page.
prompt.apiNotes: No public JSON API. Internal POST endpoints exist for cart (/catalog/catalogapi.php) but are session-coupled and not useful for search. Keep using GET /en/partsearch/?partnum=.
